name: ELD / HOS compliance violation (fear + authority)
subject: ACTION REQUIRED: ELD violation flagged on your record (24h deadline)
trucking_context: Drivers fear OOS orders and CSA hits; impersonating FMCSA / ELD vendors with a 24-hour deadline mirrors known scam patterns reported on driver forums.
indicators: FMCSA does not contact drivers by email about HOS violations — those flow through the carrier safety department
Sender domain fmcsa-eld-portal.net is not a real FMCSA domain (real FMCSA domains end in .dot.gov)
Generic 'compliance portal' login is not how any major ELD vendor (Samsara, KeepTruckin/Motive, Geotab) handles RODS edits
24-hour deadline + threat of OOS pressures action without verification
